scripts.check: npm run build && cargo fmt --check --manifest-path ./src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo check --manifest-path ./src-tauri/Cargo.toml && node --check sidecar/index.mjs && node --check sidecar/council.mjs && node --check scripts/release-metadata.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-release.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-release-app.mjs && node --check scripts/smoke-installed-app.mjs && node --check scripts/create-release-manifest.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-release-manifest.mjs && node --check scripts/create-release-summary.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-release-summary.mjs && node --check scripts/package-release-artifacts.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-release-package.mjs && node --check scripts/archive-release-package.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-release-archive.mjs
scripts.check:full: npm run check && npm run test:e2e:build
scripts.release:check: npm run release:verify && npm run release:smoke && npm run release:install-smoke && npm run release:manifest && npm run release:manifest:verify && npm run release:summary && npm run release:summary:verify && npm run release:package && npm run release:package:verify && npm run release:archive && npm run release:archive:verify
